description: text-transform (uppercase/capitalize/lowercase, incl. a plain th cell), letter-spacing (positive via PDF Tc, negative), word-spacing on inter-word spaces, and text-indent (points and percent, first line only). Default base-14 font so transformed text stays searchable.
visual_assertions: The heading is uppercase with visibly tracked (letter-spaced) glyphs.
The capitalize paragraph starts every word with a capital letter.
The lowercase paragraph has no capitals.
The word-spacing paragraph shows wide inter-word gaps with normal glyph spacing.
The 30pt and 10% indent paragraphs indent only their first lines.
The plain table header cells render uppercase (COLUMN HEADER / SECOND HEADER).
